'''Yin Wood Rabbit''' is the 52nd of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 乙 Kinoto (yin wood, the luna-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 卯 U, the [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, both stem and branch share the wood element, doubling its weight in this node.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Wood Tiger]] (node 51) and [[Yang Fire Dragon]] (node 53).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoto (乙)]] — yin wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] — yin wood
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Wood Tiger]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Fire Dragon]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904791}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
